purpose: Guided choice flow for qiaomu-ppt. It collects essential context before execution, helps users choose topic direction, depth, page count, style, image-generation/API policy, and output formats with short coded replies, then starts research/planning with executable defaults.
principles: Every choice group has a recommended default.
The user may reply with compact codes such as 1A 2B 3C.
If the user says generate/default/默认 after a guided choice card, use the recommended defaults and begin research/planning; do not treat that as permission to render the final PPT.

The first substantive artifacts after context are a stored research package and a source-synthesis article under ~/Downloads/Qiaomu PPT/<date>-<slug>/, including source links, downloaded/extracted images, research_dossier.md, content_report.md or 内容母稿-<主题>.md, README.md, and task_manifest.json.
Initial requests such as 生成一个PPT, 做个PPT, 直接生成, 默认, 越快越好, or a page count do not bypass the context card or later confirmation gates.
Ask only decision groups that materially affect output; do not show a long form.
Do not omit production-impact choices such as image generation/API policy and output formats unless the user already specified them.
Image-generation API setup is useful but optional: ask when relevant, but do not block a deck on provider configuration unless final-quality real image generation is required.
Public wording is plain and outcome-oriented; internal design terms stay hidden.
The chosen/default values must become a choice_contract in the deck project.

default_groups.label: 主题方向
default_groups.when: Topic is broad or has multiple plausible angles.

options.label: 最佳默认
options.description: 自动选择最适合普通听众的主线，兼顾吸引力和科学边界。

options.label: 案例吸引
options.description: 优先用故事、案例、现象切入，适合公开分享。

options.label: 系统讲解
options.description: 优先讲清框架、概念、机制，适合课程和内部培训。

options.label: 争议辨析
options.description: 同时讲解释力、限制和反方观点，适合理性/学术听众。

options.label: 普通听众
options.description: 少术语，多例子，讲完能复述核心观点。

options.label: 进阶读者
options.description: 保留关键概念、研究边界和方法争议。

options.label: 专业讨论
options.description: 强调理论、证据链、可检验性和反驳。

options.label: 8页精简
options.description: 适合10分钟以内快速分享。

options.label: 12页标准
options.description: 推荐默认，足够讲清结构、案例和结论。

options.label: 16页深入
options.description: 适合30分钟以上，有更多证据和图解。

options.label: 清晰讲解
options.description: 推荐默认，结构清楚、图解友好、投影可读。

options.label: 演讲故事
options.description: 更有节奏和记忆点，适合舞台/分享会。

options.label: 研究报告
options.description: 证据和引用更强，适合严肃汇报。

options.label: 文化杂志
options.description: 更有阅读气质，适合人物、历史、文化主题。

default_groups.label: 配图/生图
default_groups.when: Image policy is not specified and the deck benefits from visuals, atmosphere, diagrams, or section art.

options.label: Codex生图优先
options.description: 推荐默认：Codex/宿主内置生图可用时直接使用，用于封面、章节/转场、概念隐喻、安静背景和结尾氛围；证据图仍用真实来源。非 Codex 环境再检测已配置 API；都不可用才生成 prompt/占位并记录缺口。

options.label: 帮我配置生图API
options.description: 可选：询问并协助配置 GPT-image、Nanobanana、Seedream、Jimeng 或 OpenAI-compatible API。

options.label: 只用来源/图解
options.description: 不用 AI 氛围图，优先真实图片、截图、图表和自绘示意。

options.label: 预览后决定
options.description: 四页预览里先看版式，再决定是否批量生成图片。

default_groups.label: 生图API
default_groups.when: Ask only if image_generation=B, or when non-Codex runtime has no configured image provider and the user wants final-quality generated images.

options.label: GPT-image/OpenAI
options.description: 使用 OPENAI_API_KEY 或 OpenAI-compatible 配置。

options.label: Nanobanana
options.description: 使用用户提供的 Nanobanana/Gemini image API 或兼容代理配置。

options.label: Seedream/即梦
options.description: 使用 Seedream/即梦/火山生态或兼容代理配置。

options.label: 其他兼容API
options.description: 使用用户提供的 base_url、model、auth scheme 和 API key env。

options.label: PPTX+PDF+HTML
options.description: 推荐默认，可编辑、可分享、可网页预览。

options.label: 只要PPTX
options.description: 最快，适合本地继续修改。

options.label: HTML优先
options.description: 适合动效、网页演示和在线分享。

options.label: 加Keynote
options.description: 在可用的 macOS/Keynote 环境下额外导出 .key，失败则记录证据。

options.label: NotebookLM原生
options.description: 使用 NotebookLM 搜索/slide-deck 直接生成 PPTX+PDF；可能是图片式 PPTX，会单独记录水印清理证据。

execution_defaults.default_reply_policy: If user says generate/default/按默认 after the choice card, select all default_option values and start research/planning.
execution_defaults.normal_default_image_generation: codex_host_native_first; configured_api_second; source/evidence/product visuals stay real/source-backed; if neither real generation route exists, create image prompts and placeholders, then record missing real image generation evidence instead of blocking.
execution_defaults.normal_default_preview: For decks over 7 pages, produce design proposal then four-slide preview before full generation unless user explicitly says skip preview.
execution_defaults.direct_generate_override: If the user explicitly says 直接进入生成阶段/直接生成最终版/不用确认/跳过方案/跳过资料确认/跳过预览/一口气生成, record skipped_by_user and proceed with defaults.
